title: AJAZZ Control Center plugin manifest
description: Manifest format for AJAZZ Control Center plugins. Designed to be a strict superset of the public fields of the Elgato Stream Deck plugin manifest (https://schemas.elgato.com/streamdeck/plugins/manifest.json) and OpenDeck's CodePathLin / CodePaths extensions, so existing plugins can be loaded with at most a thin compatibility shim. AJAZZ-specific fields live under the `Ajazz` namespace and are optional for SDK-2 compatibility.

$schema.description: URI of the JSON Schema this manifest validates against.

UUID.description: Reverse-DNS unique identifier (e.g. com.aiacos.spotify-now-playing). Lowercase ASCII alphanumerics, hyphens, periods only.

Name.description: Human-readable name shown in the Plugin Store and the action list.

Version.description: Semantic version (a.b.c[.d][-pre]). Stream-Deck-style four-segment versions are also accepted.

Description.description: One-line summary shown in the store grid.

Category.description: Optional grouping label in the action list (e.g. "Streaming", "System").

CategoryIcon.description: Path to the category icon (extension omitted, monochrome white-on-transparent PNG/SVG).

Icon.description: Path (extension omitted) to the plugin icon. PNG/SVG; 28x28 + 56x56 (@2x).

URL.description: Marketing / homepage URL (clickable in the store details pane).

SupportURL.description: Issue tracker or support page URL.

CodePath.description: Default plugin entry point (relative to the manifest directory). Used when no platform-specific override matches.

CodePathMac.description: macOS-specific entry point. Stream Deck SDK compat field.

CodePathWin.description: Windows-specific entry point. Stream Deck SDK compat field.

CodePathLin.description: Linux-specific entry point. OpenDeck extension; preferred over CodePath on Linux.

CodePaths.description: OpenDeck extension: per-Rust-target binary paths (e.g. {"x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu": "bin/plugin"}). Keys MUST be valid Rust target triples; the loader picks the entry whose triple matches the host.

PropertyInspectorPath.description: Optional default Property Inspector page (HTML/HTM). Path is relative to the plugin root, no leading slash.

DefaultWindowSize.description: Suggested Property Inspector size in CSS pixels [width, height].

Nodejs.description: Optional Node.js runtime preferences (Stream Deck SDK compat).

MinimumVersion.description: Minimum supported OS version (e.g. "13" for macOS 13, "10" for Win10, "22.04" for Ubuntu 22.04).

SDKVersion.description: Stream Deck SDK protocol version this plugin targets. AJAZZ Control Center implements SDK 2 today; SDK 3 reserved.

MinimumVersion.description: Minimum AJAZZ Control Center version this plugin requires (e.g. "1.2").

ApplicationsToMonitor.description: OS-specific lists of executables / bundle ids whose foreground state the plugin observes (Stream Deck SDK compat).

Profiles.description: Pre-defined profiles bundled with the plugin (auto-installed on first activation).

DeviceType.description: Stream Deck DeviceType id (0..13) or AJAZZ-specific id (14..99). See docs/architecture/PLUGIN-SDK.md.

Actions.description: Actions (button behaviours) exposed by this plugin.

UUID.description: Reverse-DNS id, must start with the plugin UUID (e.g. com.aiacos.spotify.play).

Controllers.description: Hardware affordances supported by the action. Default: ["Keypad"].

layout.description: Pre-defined layout id ($A0/$A1/$B1/$B2/$C1/$X1) or relative path to a custom layout JSON.

Ajazz.description: AJAZZ Control Center extensions (optional). Plugins targeting Stream Deck only do not need this block.

MinimumAccVersion.description: Minimum ajazz-control-center version (overrides Software.MinimumVersion when present).

items.description: Device codename (e.g. akp03, akp153, akp05, ak980pro, ak200).

SupportedDevices.description: Restricts the plugin to a subset of supported AJAZZ devices. Empty / missing = all devices.

Sandbox.description: Sandboxing preferences (advisory until per-OS containers are wired in).

Permissions.description: Coarse permissions the plugin requests. UI surfaces these at install time so the user can review them.

Signing.description: Sigstore / cosign attestation metadata for the published bundle.

Compatibility.description: Hints for the OpenDeck / Stream Deck / AJAZZ Streamdock compatibility shim.

Mode.description: Wire-protocol dialect the plugin expects. 'native' speaks the Ajazz JSON RPC directly; 'opendeck' and 'streamdeck' load existing OpenDeck / Elgato plugins through their respective compatibility shims; 'streamdock' loads plugins published on the official AJAZZ Streamdock store, which uses an Elgato SDK-2 superset with AJAZZ-specific extensions for hardware-accelerated dial widgets and per-key haptics.

OpenDeckBinaryName.description: When Mode=opendeck, names the precompiled binary picked from CodePaths or CodePathLin.

StreamdockProductId.description: When Mode=streamdock, the upstream product identifier on the AJAZZ Streamdock store. Used by the catalogue mirror to resolve update channels and signed bundle URLs.
